title: Lawyers treat litigation like war, unwilling to concede even an inch: Mukul Rohatgi
description: Senior Advocate Mukul Rohatgi on Saturday observed that the Indian legal system has increasingly begun to treat litigation like a war, with lawyers often unwilling to concede even an inch.He further emphasised the need to strengthen mediation as a meaningful alternative for resolving legal disputes.Rohatgi was speaking at the first national conference organised by the Supreme Court Bar Association (SCBA) on the theme “Reimagining Judicial Governance: Strengthening Institutions for Democratic Jus
